modules.name: Blue Core
modules.purpose: Identity orchestration, conversation, provider abstraction, policy, and capability routing.

modules.name: Blue Memory
modules.purpose: User-controlled memory, retrieval, projects, provenance, retention, and search.

modules.name: Blue Guardian
modules.purpose: Authentication, authorization, integrity, audit, approvals, vault, backup, and recovery.

modules.name: Blue Archive
modules.purpose: Searchable conversations, sources, versions, decisions, artifacts, and history.

modules.name: Blue Forge
modules.purpose: Provenance-tracked creation, approval-gated file proposals, releases, and bounded test runners.

modules.name: Blue Laboratory
modules.purpose: Separate ideas, hypotheses, experiments, and verified findings with assumptions and evidence.

modules.name: Blue Academy
modules.purpose: Citation-backed answers, lessons, assessments, and human-reviewed learning.

modules.name: Blue Network
modules.purpose: Authenticated trusted-host communication, revocation, and conflict-aware synchronization.

modules.name: Blue Presence
modules.purpose: Desktop body, voice, OBS visibility, invitations, consent indicators, and future platform adapters.

modules.name: Blue Enterprise
modules.purpose: Projects and tasks now; scheduling, inventory, analytics, and team coordination later.

modules.name: Blue Finance
modules.purpose: Audited budgeting and records only after formal policy, separation of duties, and transaction controls.

modules.name: Blue Robotics
modules.purpose: Simulation-first body adapters, diagnostics, bounded motion, maintenance, and emergency stop.

modules.name: Blue Explorer
modules.purpose: Peaceful scientific, environmental, inspection, and disaster-support missions.

modules.name: Blue Continuity
modules.purpose: Versioned backups, checksums, restore drills, migration records, and recovery planning.

modules.name: Blue Governance
modules.purpose: Constitution, principals, approvals, quorum, decisions, policy history, and stewardship.
